type.source_text: typedef char *STBSP_SPRINTFCB(const char *buf, void *user, int len)

source_location.source_line: typedef char *STBSP_SPRINTFCB(const char *buf, void *user, int len);
#define STB_SPRINTF_MIN 512 // how many characters per callback
#define STB_SPRINTF_DECORATE(name) stbsp_##name // define this before including if you want to change the names

macros.name: stbsp__chk_cb_bufL
macros.value: { int len = (int)(bf - buf); if ((len + (bytes)) >= STB_SPRINTF_MIN) { tlen += len; if (0 == (bf = buf = callback(buf, user, len))) goto done; } }

macros.name: stbsp__cb_buf_clamp
macros.value: cl = v; if (callback) { int lg = STB_SPRINTF_MIN - (int)(bf - buf); if (cl > lg) cl = lg; }

source_location.source_line: #define STBSP__NUMSZ 512 // big enough for e308 (with commas) or e-307

macros.name: stbsp__ddmulthi
macros.value: { double ahi = 0, alo, bhi = 0, blo; stbsp__int64 bt; oh = xh * yh; STBSP__COPYFP(bt, xh); bt &= ((~(stbsp__uint64)0) << 27); STBSP__COPYFP(ahi, bt); alo = xh - ahi; STBSP__COPYFP(bt, yh); bt &= ((~(stbsp__uint64)0) << 27); STBSP__COPYFP(bhi, bt); blo = yh - bhi; ol = ((ahi * bhi - oh) + ahi * blo + alo * bhi) + alo * blo; }

macros.name: stbsp__ddtoS64
macros.value: { double ahi = 0, alo, vh, t; ob = (stbsp__int64)xh; vh = (double)ob; ahi = (xh - vh); t = (ahi - xh); alo = (xh - (ahi - t)) - (vh + t); ob += (stbsp__int64)(ahi + alo + xl); }

macros.name: stbsp__ddrenorm
macros.value: { double s; s = oh + ol; ol = ol - (s - oh); oh = s; }

source_location.source_line: #define stbsp__ddmultlo(oh, ol, xh, xl, yh, yl) ol = ol + (xh * yl + xl * yh);
#define stbsp__ddmultlos(oh, ol, xh, yl) ol = ol + (xh * yl);
